prompt: Create a square 1:1 digital graphic on a pure black background featuring the lowercase word bug as the central subject. Use exactly 3 large rounded lowercase letters, thick and glossy, with a beveled 3D glass/plastic look: the left letter in electric cyan-blue, the middle letter blending deep blue to violet, and the right letter in hot magenta-pink. Add bright neon outlines, inner glow, reflective highlights, and subtle transparent depth inside each letter. Behind the word, place exactly 1 circular energy ring, incomplete and hand-drawn in feel, wrapping around the text with a blue arc on the left/top and a purple-magenta arc on the right/bottom. Add small glowing particles scattered around the ring and text, plus exactly 4 prominent starburst lens flares: one at the upper left of the first letter, one at the lower left edge, one near the top of the middle letter, and one bright pink flare on the upper right of the last letter. The overall style should be high-contrast cyber neon, luminous, crisp, centered, with no extra text, no border, and no watermark.
